title: Shielded Hearts
description: Replaces the standart Minecraft armor bar with a shield-styled design, making your protection look stronger and more unique
body:
**Shielded Hearts** is a simple yet stylish resource pack that reimagines the standard armor bar in Minecraft. Instead of the plain armor icons, your protection is now displayed as shield-shaped symbols, making your HUD look more solid and unique.

This pack is **perfect** for players who enjoy survival, or just want their game interface to feel fresh and different. The shield-styled design gives a stronger visual impression of defense, so every piece of armor you equip feels more meaningful.
